category_sources: Official Fn repository describes Fn as an event-driven open source Functions-as-a-Service compute platform.
source_facts.description says this is the command-line tool for the Fn project.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/fnproject/cli is titled fnproject/cli and describes the CLI tool for fnproject.
docs_sources: Official Fn platform repository README links quickstart, tutorials, and full documentation.
Official source_facts.repo points to fnproject/cli; its README is the CLI documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/fnproject/cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Fn repository topics and README identify serverless, FaaS, containers, and Docker-oriented usage.
source_facts.description identifies a command-line tool for Fn.
